base_url.description: Microsoft Graph REST API base URL override for tests or proxies. Defaults to https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0.

login_base_url.description: Azure AD login base URL override for tests or proxies; combined with tenant_id to derive the OAuth2 token endpoint.

token_url.description: Full OAuth2 token endpoint override. When set, takes priority over the derived login_base_url/tenant_id endpoint (see docs.md Known limits for the dual-candidate auth mechanism used to express this).

scope.description: OAuth2 client-credentials scope. Defaults to the static Graph application-permission scope.

client_id.description: Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) application (client) ID used for the OAuth2 client-credentials grant. Never logged.

client_secret.description: Microsoft Entra ID application client secret, sent only in the OAuth2 client-credentials token-exchange request; never logged.

tenant_id.description: Microsoft Entra ID tenant ID (GUID or verified domain), used to derive the per-tenant token endpoint. Marked secret to match legacy, which reads it from Secrets.

page_size.description: Records requested per @odata.nextLink page (1-999), sent as the $top query parameter on the first request of each stream.

max_pages.description: Optional hard cap on the number of @odata.nextLink pages read per stream, consumed by hooks/microsoft-entra-id/hooks.go's StreamHook — NOT a declarative streams.json field (pagination is entirely hook-driven since next_url_path cannot address the literal "@odata.nextLink" key; see docs.md Known limits). Permissive parse: empty, "all", or "unlimited" means unbounded.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
